state.title: Desktop/eye project/docker/docker-compose.yml

metadata.preview:
- "6379:6379"
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    networks:
      - eye_disease_network
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  # Backend API
  backend:
    build:
      context: ./backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: eye_disease_backend
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres123@postgres:5432/eyedisease
